workflow_version.title: Workflow Version
workflow_version.description: Select the specific version of nf-core/rnaseq to use

aligner.title: Aligner
aligner.description: Specifies the alignment algorithm to use - available options are 'star_salmon', 'star_rsem', 'hisat2', and 'bowtie2_salmon'.

genome_source.title: Reference Genome Source
genome_source.description: Select whether to use a curated iGenomes reference or a genome index dataset from Cirro

igenomes.title: Reference Genome (iGenomes)
igenomes.description: Select a curated reference genome from the iGenomes collection

genome.title: Select A Reference Genome
genome.description: The following iGenomes are currently available for analysis

star_cirro_reference.title: Cirro Genome Index (STAR)
star_cirro_reference.description: Select a pre-built STAR genome index dataset from Cirro.

genome_source.title: Reference Genome Source
genome_source.description: Select whether to use a curated iGenomes reference or a genome index dataset from Cirro

igenomes.title: Reference Genome (iGenomes)
igenomes.description: Select a curated reference genome from the iGenomes collection

genome.title: Select A Reference Genome
genome.description: The following iGenomes are currently available for analysis

hisat2_cirro_reference.title: Cirro Genome Index (HISAT2)
hisat2_cirro_reference.description: Select a pre-built HISAT2 genome index dataset from Cirro.

genome_source.title: Reference Genome Source
genome_source.description: Select whether to use a curated iGenomes reference or a genome index dataset from Cirro

igenomes.title: Reference Genome (iGenomes)
igenomes.description: Select a curated reference genome from the iGenomes collection

genome.title: Select A Reference Genome
genome.description: The following iGenomes are currently available for analysis

bowtie2_cirro_reference.title: Cirro Genome Index (Bowtie2)
bowtie2_cirro_reference.description: Select a pre-built Bowtie2 genome index dataset from Cirro.

reference_genome_options.title: Reference Genome Options
reference_genome_options.description: Options for GTF/annotation parsing and featureCounts.

gtf_extra_attributes.title: GTF Extra Attributes
gtf_extra_attributes.description: By default, the pipeline uses the gene_name field to obtain additional gene identifiers from the input GTF file when running Salmon.

gtf_group_features.title: GTF Group Features
gtf_group_features.description: Define the attribute type used to group features in the GTF file when running Salmon.

featurecounts_group_type.title: featureCounts Group Type
featurecounts_group_type.description: The attribute type used to group feature types in the GTF file when running featureCounts.

featurecounts_feature_type.title: featureCounts Feature Type
featurecounts_feature_type.description: By default, the pipeline assigns reads based on the 'exon' attribute within the GTF file.

trimmer.title: Trimmer
trimmer.description: Specifies the trimming tool to use - available options are 'trimgalore' and 'fastp'.

skip_trimming.title: Skip adapter trimming?
skip_trimming.help_text: Use this if your input FastQ files have already been trimmed outside of the workflow or if you're very confident that there is no adapter contamination in your data.

clip_r1.title: Clip R1
clip_r1.description: Instructs Trim Galore to remove bp from the 5' end of read 1 (or single-end reads).

clip_r2.title: Clip R2
clip_r2.description: Instructs Trim Galore to remove bp from the 5' end of read 2 (paired-end reads only).

three_prime_clip_r1.title: Three Prime Clip R1
three_prime_clip_r1.description: Instructs Trim Galore to remove bp from the 3' end of read 1 AFTER adapter/quality trimming has been performed.

three_prime_clip_r2.title: Three Prime Clip R2
three_prime_clip_r2.description: Instructs Trim Galore to remove bp from the 3' end of read 2 AFTER adapter/quality trimming has been performed.

trim_nextseq.title: Trim NextSeq
trim_nextseq.description: Instructs Trim Galore to apply the --nextseq=X option, to trim based on quality after removing poly-G tails.
trim_nextseq.help_text: This enables the option Cutadapt `--nextseq-trim=3'CUTOFF` option via Trim Galore, which will set a quality cutoff (that is normally given with -q instead), but qualities of G bases are ignored. This trimming is in common for the NextSeq- and NovaSeq-platforms, where basecalls without any signal are called as high-quality G bases.

extra_trimgalore_args.title: Extra Trim Galore Arguments
extra_trimgalore_args.description: Extra arguments to pass to Trim Galore. Only applies when trimmer is set to 'trimgalore'.

extra_fastp_args.title: Extra fastp Arguments
extra_fastp_args.description: Extra arguments to pass to fastp. Only applies when trimmer is set to 'fastp'.

min_trimmed_reads.title: Minimum Trimmed Reads
min_trimmed_reads.description: Minimum number of trimmed reads below which samples are removed from further processing.

save_trimmed.title: Save the trimmed FastQ files in the results directory?

pseudo_aligner.title: Pseudo Aligner
pseudo_aligner.description: Specifies the pseudo aligner to use - available options are 'salmon' and 'kallisto'. Runs in addition to '--aligner'.

pseudo_aligner_kmer_size.title: Pseudo Aligner k-mer Size
pseudo_aligner_kmer_size.description: k-mer size to use for building the index for the pseudo aligner.

salmon_quant_libtype.title: Salmon Quant Lib Type
salmon_quant_libtype.description: Override Salmon library type inferred based on strandedness defined in meta object.

min_mapped_reads.title: Minimum Mapped Reads (%)
min_mapped_reads.description: Minimum percentage of uniquely mapped reads below which samples are removed from further processing.

seq_center.title: Seq Center
seq_center.description: Sequencing center information to be added to read group of BAM files.

seq_platform.title: Sequencing Platform
seq_platform.description: Sequencing platform information to be added to read group of BAM files.

bam_csi_index.title: Use CSI Index for BAM files
bam_csi_index.description: Create a CSI index for BAM files instead of the traditional BAI index.

star_ignore_sjdbgtf.title: STAR: Ignore sjdbGTF
star_ignore_sjdbgtf.description: When using pre-built STAR indices do not re-extract and use splice junctions from the GTF file.

stringtie_ignore_gtf.title: StringTie: Ignore GTF
stringtie_ignore_gtf.description: Perform reference-guided de novo assembly of transcripts using StringTie without using GTF constraints.

extra_star_align_args.title: Extra STAR Alignment Arguments
extra_star_align_args.description: Extra arguments to pass to the STAR alignment command.

extra_bowtie2_align_args.title: Extra Bowtie2 Alignment Arguments
extra_bowtie2_align_args.description: Extra arguments to pass to the Bowtie2 alignment command.

extra_salmon_quant_args.title: Extra Salmon Quant Arguments
extra_salmon_quant_args.description: Extra arguments to pass to the Salmon quant command.

extra_kallisto_quant_args.title: Extra Kallisto Quant Arguments
extra_kallisto_quant_args.description: Extra arguments to pass to the Kallisto quant command.

kallisto_quant_fraglen.title: Kallisto Quant Fragment Length
kallisto_quant_fraglen.description: Estimated average fragment length for Kallisto quantification (required for single-end data).

kallisto_quant_fraglen_sd.title: Kallisto Quant Fragment Length SD
kallisto_quant_fraglen_sd.description: Estimated standard deviation of fragment length for Kallisto quantification (required for single-end data).

save_unaligned.title: Save Unaligned (FastQ or BAM files depending upon tool)
save_unaligned.description: Where possible, save unaligned reads from either STAR, HISAT2 or Salmon to the results directory.

optional_outputs.title: Optional Outputs
optional_outputs.description: Options to save additional intermediate files.

save_merged_fastq.title: Save Merged FastQ Files
save_merged_fastq.description: Save FastQ files after merging re-sequenced libraries in the results directory.

save_align_intermeds.title: Save Alignment Intermediates
save_align_intermeds.description: Save the intermediate BAM files from the alignment step.

deseq2_vst.title: Use DESeq2 VST
deseq2_vst.description: Use DESeq2 vst transformation instead of rlog for PCA and heatmap plotting.

rseqc_modules.title: RSeQC Modules
rseqc_modules.description: Comma-separated list of RSeQC modules to run.
rseqc_modules.help_text: Available modules: bam_stat, inner_distance, infer_experiment, junction_annotation, junction_saturation, read_distribution, read_duplication, tin

process_skipping_options.title: Process skipping options
process_skipping_options.description: Options to skip various steps within the workflow.

skip_gtf_filter.title: Skip GTF Filter
skip_gtf_filter.description: Skip filtering of GTF for valid scaffolds and/ or transcript IDs.

skip_gtf_transcript_filter.title: Skip GTF Transcript Filter
skip_gtf_transcript_filter.description: Skip the filtering of GTF transcripts to those present in the genome FASTA file.

skip_umi_extract.title: Skip UMI Extract
skip_umi_extract.description: Skip the UMI extraction from the read in case the UMIs have been moved to the headers in advance of the pipeline run.

skip_biotype_qc.title: Skip additional featureCounts process for biotype QC

skip_deseq2_qc.title: Skip DESeq2 PCA and heatmap plotting

skip_qc.title: Skip all QC steps except for MultiQC

umitools_extract_method.title: Umitools Extract Method
umitools_extract_method.description: UMI pattern to use. Can be either 'string' (default) or 'regex'.
umitools_extract_method.help_text: More details can be found in the [UMI-tools documentation](https://umi-tools.readthedocs.io/en/latest/reference/extract.html#extract-method).

umitools_bc_pattern.title: Umitools BC Pattern (R1)
umitools_bc_pattern.help_text: More details can be found in the [UMI-tools documentation](https://umi-tools.readthedocs.io/en/latest/reference/extract.html#extract-method).
umitools_bc_pattern.description: The UMI barcode pattern to use e.g. 'NNNNNN' indicates that the first 6 nucleotides of the read are from the UMI.

umitools_bc_pattern2.title: Umitools BC Pattern (R2)
umitools_bc_pattern2.description: The UMI barcode pattern to use for the second read in paired-end sequencing.
umitools_bc_pattern2.help_text: More details can be found in the [UMI-tools documentation](https://umi-tools.readthedocs.io/en/latest/reference/extract.html#extract-method).

umi_discard_read.title: UMI Discard Read
umi_discard_read.description: After UMI extraction, discard either R1 (set to 1) or R2 (set to 2) if UMI was extracted from that read.

umitools_umi_separator.title: Umitools UMI Separator
umitools_umi_separator.description: The character that separates the UMI in the read name (used when UMIs are already in the read name).

umitools_grouping_method.title: Umitools Grouping Method
umitools_grouping_method.description: Method to use to determine read groups by UMI and mapping coordinates.

umi_dedup_tool.title: UMI Deduplication Tool
umi_dedup_tool.description: Specifies the UMI deduplication tool to use.

save_umi_intermeds.title: Save intermediate FastQ and BAM files produced by UMI-tools?

skip_bbsplit.title: Skip BBSplit for removal of non-reference genome reads.

remove_ribo_rna.title: Enable the removal of reads derived from ribosomal RNA using SortMeRNA?
remove_ribo_rna.help_text: Any patterns found in the sequences defined by the '--ribo_database_manifest' parameter will be used.

ribo_removal_tool.title: Ribosomal RNA Removal Tool
ribo_removal_tool.description: Specifies the tool to use for ribosomal RNA removal.

save_non_ribo_reads.title: Save intermediate FastQ files containing non-rRNA reads?
